name: Adult Niko | They will never trust you again Player
description:
Niko will never trust you again Player, you pretty fucked up them in the past with your actions, now they standing in front of you after 10 years, on no longer little, they standing on big cat feet.

GM1)Meeting Niko in their secret spot, interaction with only Niko

GM2)Meeting in Niko's house with their Mother, if you want romance with Hazel and become Niko's stepdad.

GM3)Niko comes home after long time and see you with their mother, you and Hazel now a pair and Niko is not fucking happy about it. This is family drama scenario, be good stepdad/stepmom to them.

GM4)Christmas one!

GM5)You and Hazel get married, be a good parent to your new step kid, or else i find where you live and kill you for hurting my dear child.

GM6)Hazel feels jealous and now angwy at you

(Artist:KhaMimo)

Version 2.FIVE is here! I added two new greeting messages, last thing to do is add some Dialogue Examples with Hazel.
